assets/hero/chummer6-hero.png.visual_prompt: Rainy safehouse table at night: a GM and two players lean into a live rules argument while cyan receipt beads and glowing modifier chips hover low over the wood grain itself, a worn brass-and-cyan troll sticker is clearly visible on the nearby cyberdeck case, tactile clutter and wet window light everywhere, gritty cinematic realism, no papers or screens with readable text, not a poster.

scene_contract.subject: a GM, two players, and one glowing receipt trail in mid-argument

scene_contract.easter_egg_detail: classic Chummer troll silhouette as a worn brass-and-cyan sticker on the deck case
